No Poverty.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content and objectives do not explicitly or implicitly address health and well-being targets.

Quality Education.reason: As a university language course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3), develops relevant skills (Target 4.4), and fosters cultural appreciation (Target 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course content and objectives do not explicitly or implicitly address gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides language skills that can enhance future employment and economic opportunities, particularly for students planning to study or work abroad (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course promotes social inclusion by encouraging interaction with international students (Target 10.2) and facilitates mobility through plans for studying or exchanging abroad (Target 10.7).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' (尊重版權所有) aligns minimally with responsible consumption and production of intellectual property.

Climate Action.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: The course content and objectives have no discernible connection to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course promotes intercultural understanding and interaction with foreign students, which contributes to a culture of peace and non-violence (indirectly supporting Goal 16).
